name: meridian
description: Markdown-first Paper Wiki and Lab research-coding copilot for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Setup Meridian, use Paper Wiki, and run Lab research-coding workflows.
interface.longDescription: Meridian exposes three user-facing skills: meridian for setup and migration, wiki for Paper Wiki update/use workflows, and lab for wiki-grounded research coding with ideas, experiments, evidence, and local findings.
defaultPrompt: Check my Meridian setup and migrate anything out of date.
Ingest this paper into my Paper Wiki.
Use my Paper Wiki to answer this research question.
Use Lab to debug this failed run and preserve the experiment evidence.
